name: Gardiniere
recipeIngredient: 3 Red bell peppers, cut into large squares
2 Red banana peppers, cut into rings
1 small Buttercup squash, peeled, seeded & cubed
1 cup Chinese white radish, thinly sliced & peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the vegetables and layer in a large bowl. Sprinkle each layer with salt.
2. Pour in just enough water to cover. Place a plate on top to keep the vegetables submerged.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight.
4. Drain, rinse several times in cold water, and drain again.
Meanwhile:
1. Place 4 sprigs of basil in a small jar. Add whole garlic cloves and just enough oil to cover.
2. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight.
3. Prepare the pickling brine by boiling the water, vinegar, and sugar. Bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar is dissolved and then keep hot until ready to use.
4. Sterilize 4 500mL canning jars.
5. In each jar, place a basil sprig, garlic clove, and half teaspoon of mustard seeds.
6. Without forcing, pack the vegetables into the jars, leaving 3/4 inch headspace.
7. Pour pickling brine into each jar up to 1/2 inch from the top.
8. Remove any air bubbles by sliding a rubber spatula around the edge of the jar; wipe rims and finger-tighten lids.
9. Process in a boiling water bath for 20 minutes, remove, cool, label, and store.
